questions.question: How does OTP extraction work in MailAgent?
gold: extractOtp in src/services/extract.ts combines text and html
Runs in queue consumer processInboundEmail not in Resend webhook
Uses regex patterns and parse-otp-message fallback
Read via GET /v1/inboxes/:id/extract or MCP mailagent_extract_verification

questions.question: How do I deploy MailAgent to production?
gold: wrangler login and wrangler secret put for DATABASE_URL RESEND_API_KEY RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET API_KEY INBOX_DOMAIN
npm run deploy and npm run db:migrate
Resend webhook URL must point to POST /webhooks/resend
R2 bucket mailagent-raw-mime for raw MIME
CI deploys on push to main via deploy-worker.yml

questions.question: Why are users not receiving emails in their MailAgent inbox?
gold: Inbound path: Resend webhook enqueue queue consumer findInboxByAddress
isSenderAllowed drops mail not matching allowed_senders silently
Check Resend webhook events and INBOX_DOMAIN on address
Queue retries and DLQ mailagent-email-dlq on failures
Use GET diagnose or list messages to debug

questions.question: What is MailAgent and who is it for?
gold: Temporary inboxes for AI agents and QA E2E
OTP and magic link extraction without HTML parsing
Users: QA engineers Playwright CI MCP agents teams

questions.question: Why is OTP empty but a message exists in the inbox?
gold: Extract uses text plus html from Resend receiving API
HTML-only or unusual format may miss regex
Check links and primaryLink for magic link flows
Wrong messageIndex may read welcome email not verify email

questions.question: How does inbox creation work?
gold: Address inbox-{nanoid}@INBOX_DOMAIN or custom verified domain
ttlMinutes label callbackUrl allowed_senders from expectFrom or service preset

questions.question: What REST API endpoints exist for inboxes?
gold: GET wait events messages extract diagnose callbacks
DELETE inbox and labelPrefix bulk delete

questions.question: How is the Cloudflare Worker structured?
gold: Entry src/index.ts with fetch queue scheduled handlers
Hono routes in src/routes business logic in src/services

questions.question: What database tables are critical in MailAgent?
gold: Neon Postgres via migrations in migrations/
inboxes and messages are core tables
teams and api_keys for multi-tenant auth
migrations applied with npm run db:migrate

questions.question: What environment variables are required for the Worker?
gold: Set via wrangler secret put or .dev.vars locally
MAILAGENT_API_URL and MAILAGENT_API_KEY for MCP client in .env

rate limit max inboxes team keys domains

questions.question: How does custom domain inbox work?
Why does the email queue DLQ matter?

gold: Preferred agent tool wait and primaryAction

questions.question: How does API key authentication and resolveAuth work?
gold: Order: mat_ OAuth then DB hash then legacy API_KEY env
hint is SHA-256 prefix for rate limit and inbox scoping
Scoped keys use labelPrefix and readOnly from api_keys table

questions.question: How does Stripe billing and checkout work in MailAgent?
gold: canUpgradeViaStripe only free to pro self-serve
Stripe webhook POST /webhooks/stripe updates team plan
Enterprise plan set manually via team:plan not Stripe

questions.question: What is the verification JSON object returned by extract?
gold: Fields otp primaryLink links subject from
Used by GET extract POST open agent verify and callbacks
OTP from messages.otp populated at queue ingest
primaryLink ranked by LINK_VERIFY patterns in extract.ts

questions.question: What validation rules apply to callbackUrl on inbox create?
gold: HTTPS only no localhost private IP
fireInboxCallback POSTs verification JSON on message ingest

questions.question: How are scoped API keys and labelPrefix enforced?
gold: scope_label_prefix and scope_read_only on api_keys migration 008
assertLabelForCreate requires label starting with prefix
assertInboxAccessible returns inbox_not_found for wrong prefix
narrowScope child prefix must extend parent
readOnly blocks create delete and write endpoints

questions.question: What indexes and constraints exist on the messages table?
gold: provider_id UNIQUE for idempotency Resend email_id or sim_*
Index inbox_id received_at DESC for list queries
otp links_json raw_r2_key thread fields from migrations 009-011
Extract happens before insert in queue consumer

questions.question: Which contract test script should I run after changing billing routes?
gold: npm run test:contract:qa:billing against prod API
AGENTS.md matrix maps billing changes to this script
Full merge gate npm run test:prod
CI post-deploy uses test:prod:gate smoke only

questions.question: What wrangler bindings does the Worker need?
gold: INBOX_WAIT Durable Object InboxWait for SSE
AI Workers AI ASSETS public static

questions.question: How does structured extract with Workers AI work?
gold: Workers AI binding AI in wrangler.jsonc
Separate from OTP regex extract at ingest

questions.question: How does OAuth mat_ token work for remote MCP?
gold: Stateless JWT via MCP_OAUTH_JWT_SECRET default API_KEY
Legacy KV fallback for old tokens
POST /mcp JSON-RPC with Bearer mat_ or API key
